creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
Version change from 0.3.2 -> 0.4.0

GUI version is now GNOMEified.

Added gnome to categories.

The following patches have been removed:   patch-aa

The three new patches are just the result of a s/ulong/long/.  I don't remember
much C, but it builds again and I've tested it thoroughly.  The only thing 
that's not stable is the "Interface" menu, but that was broken before.

How-To-Repeat: 
Apply the following diff
